calendar.matters:
PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Jul-29-2013 Advanced From Oct-08-13 To Sep-03-13 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Sep-12-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Rowena Navia for and with Tomoko Smith.

The Court stated that the house is in the Trust and therefore not part of the Spousal Petition. Ms. Navia explained that the trust provision leaves the property to Tomoka Smith and her Husband, that the Husband passed away, that his share goes to his estate and that his will leaves everything to Ms. Smith. Ms. Navia also stated that the estate planning documents/instruments that were drafted show the Decedent and his Wife as Beneficiaries, that the deed was held as joint tenants, that it was his intention/that he wanted his Wife to get everything, that Ms. Smith wants to sell the property and that clarity of title is essential. Furthermore, Ms. Navia stated that one half of the Husband's half of the real property is community property, and that the other half of his half goes to the will which goes to the Wife. The Petition for Spousal Property was taken under submission. The Court stated that it has no problem with the personal property.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy T. Bradley. (Not Reported)

Advancing The Hearing Date.
Off Calendar Jul-29-2013 Granted Per Written Order
